objectives: Full test coverage audit of the mx20022 payments runtime workspace at /Volumes/Everything/Development/k2payments
constraints: Assess all #[cfg(test)] sections, integration tests/, CI config, and dead test files
important_facts: 46 total test functions across 24 files (cargo grep count)

6 unit tests in app.rs (inline #[cfg(test)]): builds_runtime_from_valid_config, processes_message_through_pipeline, duplicate_checker_aborts_pipeline_when_message_id_exists, recovers_incomplete_transactions_from_store, reloads_participant_configs_when_topology_is_unchanged, rejects_reload_when_participant_topology_changes
1 e2e integration test in crates/mx20022-runtime/tests/e2e_pipeline.rs: e2e_process_pacs008_commits_and_persists_context — tests full pipeline: config->app->process->store verify
21 config unit tests in crates/mx20022-config/src/lib.rs covering admin_auth modes, pipeline validation, channel field round-trips
3 sqlite store tests in lib.rs: begin_find_update_complete_transaction, expectation_and_dead_letter_round_trip, query_applies_sql_filters_and_limit
5 additional sqlite tests in tests_missing.rs — NOT wired into build (still gated by comment in lib.rs saying mod tests_missing is present but tests_missing.rs has a warning it is NOT wired)
NOTE: tests_missing.rs IS included via `mod tests_missing;` at lib.rs:13 — it IS compiled but tests_missing.rs wraps everything inside a nested `#[cfg(test)] mod tests {}` so they do run
mx20022-store-postgres has a #[cfg(test)] block but zero actual test functions — just the marker
mx20022-store-rocksdb: not yet read but implied to be similar
engine.rs (run_pipelines, channel dispatch, infer_message_type, extract_* helpers) has ZERO tests
domain.rs (TransactionRequest::validate) has ZERO tests
application.rs (TransactionUseCase) has ZERO tests
CryptoService: only 1 test (encrypt_decrypt_roundtrip)
CorrelationEngine: 1 test covering register+match+timeout combined
CircuitBreaker: 1 test (opens_after_threshold_and_blocks_prepare) — missing: auto-recovery after open_duration, commit resets counter
RateLimiter: 1 test — not visible in this read, likely just global scope check
RoutingEngine: 2 tests
DuplicateChecker: 2 tests (aborts on dup message_id, prepares when no dup)
AdminGrpcService tests: grpc.rs has 1 test block
AdminHTTP dispatch: 1 test block in http.rs
Auth module (auth.rs): has #[cfg(test)] block
CI workflow: runs cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy --workspace -D warnings, cargo deny check, cargo test --workspace — clippy and deny now present (improvement since last audit)
No coverage reporting step in CI
No proptest/quickcheck/criterion anywhere in workspace
tests/harness/ and tests/fixtures/ still empty stubs
decisions_made: Confirmed tests_missing.rs for sqlite IS compiled (mod tests_missing at lib.rs:13) — 5 additional tests do run
Categorized findings as CRITICAL / RECOMMEND / SUGGEST
risks_issues: engine.rs run_pipelines and all extract_* helpers have zero test coverage — this is the channel dispatch backbone
domain.rs TransactionRequest::validate has zero test coverage — 5 field validations untested
CryptoService has only 1 test — wrong-key decryption, empty key, unsupported algorithm all untested
PostgresStore has zero test functions — production backend completely unvalidated
No coverage gate in CI — merges proceed regardless of coverage regression
DuplicateChecker: no test for when multiple keys match, or when XML has no relevant fields at all
CircuitBreaker: no test for auto-recovery after open_duration expires
AcknowledgementBuilder: no test for overwrite_existing=true path
StatusResponseBuilder: abort() path tested nowhere — only commit() is covered
infer_message_type() in engine.rs: no test for JSON content-type branch vs XML fallback

iteration.summary: Second full pass of the workspace. Since the previous audit, significant test additions have been made: the inline tests in app.rs grew from 0 to 6 well-scoped unit tests covering build, process, duplicate-guard, recovery, and hot-reload; 21 config validation tests were added to mx20022-config; a true E2E integration test was added to crates/mx20022-runtime/tests/; and CI was upgraded to include clippy and cargo-deny gates. The SQLite store now has 8 tests total (3 in lib.rs + 5 in tests_missing.rs which is now compiled). Key remaining gaps are: engine.rs has zero tests despite containing all channel dispatch logic; domain.rs TransactionRequest::validate has no unit coverage; CryptoService has only a happy-path roundtrip; PostgresStore is completely untested; and no coverage reporting exists in CI.
outputs_produced: Structured test coverage report delivered to user
next_actions: Add unit tests for domain.rs TransactionRequest::validate (all 5 empty-field paths)
Add unit tests for engine.rs infer_message_type and extract_* helpers
Add CryptoService tests: empty master key, wrong-key decryption, unsupported algorithm, tampered ciphertext
Add PostgresStore integration tests using testcontainers-rs
Add CI coverage step: cargo llvm-cov --workspace with minimum threshold
Wire up a proper mock Store for unit tests that don't need SQLite

mentions.relevance_note: Security audit flagged CryptoService and auth module as high priority — test gaps in crypto confirm this
Code quality review noted engine.rs complexity — zero test coverage on that file is consistent
